name: Objekt (RE) — Oriented Debris One – Canonical Artifact
description: Canonical documentation for the first release of the generative sculpture series "Objekt (RE) — Oriented Debris One". The live behaviour is defined on-chain by seed, mode and personality parameters.
notes: Each edition is generated deterministically from the on-chain token_params (seed, mode, personalityA/B/C).
Artist intent and conservation rules are stored on-chain in the GenerativeConservationFA2 contract.
This JSON is a canonical reference for the initial release of the work.
